content:
I tried this feature and it was very effective. Thank you✨ 
In the future, when our official community account releases game information, I will use this time code to indicate the start and end times of events in the copy

Based on everyone's suggestions, we have added the 'Team Building' and 'Casual Conversation' channels, which can be found in the positions shown in the figure below🙏 
【team buildding】
https://discord.com/channels/1131791637933199470/1400749543288475770
【Casual Conversation】
https://discord.com/channels/1131791637933199470/1400750050208125010﻿

In the "Game Help-network help", I have added some tags that everyone can add when posting.
I will add corresponding tags to posts that have been posted in the past but have not been tagged, making it easier for everyone to view the posts🩷 

Thank you again for your suggestions and tolerance. In the future, Goya will continue to pay attention to your suggestions and hope to bring you a good community experience<:Emoji_AJE_M_04:1400032638298751058>
<@1131790839291596841> 能不能考虑出钢笔礼包，和群里伙伴讨论了一下高练后期都很缺钢笔，比起红石头礼包大家更愿意购买钢笔去洗密契

游戏相关的建议守密人可以在【有问必答】论坛发帖~戈雅会反馈过去的<:pray:1356053116260454534> 
https://discord.com/channels/1131791637933199470/1180845276823564288

I feel like the channel category name needs changing but idk to what.
Like what's Event Discussion? It isn't currently running events
Also casual-conversation  and english-chat reads like 2 off topic / in general channel.
I think english-chat should be changed to Morimens Chat

The naming of English chat was previously classified according to different languages, and there is indeed a problem of inaccurate classification
Other languages do not have dedicated game chat or daily chat channels, so it is not suitable to change English chat to morimens chat🙏 
﻿
[Event Discussion] I changed my name to a topic for discussion and small talk
There are many subtopics here, such as PVP, plot discussions, daily conversations, etc. The Chinese channel also has these categories

> Other languages do not have dedicated game chat or daily chat channels, so it is not suitable to change English chat to morimens chat🙏 
How about instead of the current system :
- 💭全球┊ Global
  - <#1170692781216378960>
  - <#1300659552701648960>
  - etc (for other languages)

We get a category per language :
- English
  - Morimens-chat
  - casual-conversation
  - ~~Thais image gallery~~
  - ...
- Français
  - Morimens
  - Hors-sujet
  - ...
- etc (with 1 category per language)
is a possibility, but it will take a lot of space for different chat rooms for all languages
Number of channels which requires mods increases by that amount
if you don't want to make off-topic for other languages that's its own problem
but reorganizing channels & categories to be cleaner (& allow easy expansion) would help
Supply and demand, if other languages have a big demand for it then staff will give
Also, thanks for the hard work for banning hacked account <:takenotes:1357186646294138890>
sorry, i already banned them but forgot to use the "delete previous messages". lemme know if any of their message is not deleted yet
I forgot the username of the account but we should be able to track all of his previous messages through there
since they are no longer in this server, unfortunately I can't use that to track their previous messages. tho i already manually delete their message in each channel. if i missed one, lemme know
Alright and also thanks for banning them quite fast <:thumbsup:1356086340298473574>

I've been attempting to implement this for a while, which is why I included the "language" roles, but it appears that the big boss isn't ready for some changes just yet, along with other things I wanted to present to the community. But I'm sure they will come around sooner or later, I hope.🙏
